name: Nalanda SkillFlow AI — Launch Readiness
purpose: Test plan for Nalanda SkillFlow AI launch readiness focusing on core routes and UX validation.
prompt: Test plan for Nalanda SkillFlow AI launch readiness focusing on core routes and UX validation.

chat_messages.text: Hi — I'm your BRAHL Build assistant. What are you trying to test or improve?
Here is my web app https://nalanda.base44.app/ — Nalanda SkillFlow AI. We're ready for launch. Give me a health report and Go/No-Go status.

Got it. I'll scope launch readiness: FoXYiZ smoke on landing + Explore + Learning Path + Quiz + AI Tutor, invite a QA Hunter for UX/accessibility on mobile, and link the Nalanda community learn path. Set budget below — suggest 55% automation / 45% human for a launch gate.

hitl_stories.title: Mobile learning path UX
hitl_stories.description: Safari iOS — Learning Path cards readable, no horizontal scroll breakage

hitl_stories.title: Quiz flow happy path
hitl_stories.description: Guest user can start a quiz without auth errors

hitl_stories.title: AI Tutor first message
hitl_stories.description: AI Tutor page loads and chat/input is usable

hitl_stories.title: Core Route Exploration
hitl_stories.description: As a user, I want to explore the core routes of the app to ensure they are functioning correctly.

hitl_stories.title: Learning Path Functionality
hitl_stories.description: As a user, I want to access and utilize the learning paths to enhance my learning experience.

hitl_stories.title: Quiz Interaction
hitl_stories.description: As a user, I want to take quizzes to assess my knowledge and skills.

hitl_stories.title: AI Tutor Engagement
hitl_stories.description: As a user, I want to interact with the AI Tutor for personalized learning assistance.

hitl_stories.title: UX Gap Identification
hitl_stories.description: As a QA Hunter, I want to identify any UX gaps in the application for improvement. [manual — QA Hunter]
